rulings.Case Title: HWA 555 OWNERS, LLC, A DELAWARE VS. RGN-SAN FRANCISCO XXIV, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 17, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT RGN-SAN FRANCISCO XXIV, LLC, REGUS PLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Hearing Required. It appears that the parties might not have had a meeting of the minds as to the term "rejection" and such term is not defined in the contract. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FISH TATE VS. ISMAEL RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Attorney?S Fees From Prayer For Relief 4 By Defendants Irasema Gutierrez And Felix Hernandez; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 17, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT IRASEMA GUTIERREZ Notice Of Motion To Strike Attorney?S Fees From Prayer For Relief 4 By Defendants Irasema Gutierrez And Felix Hernandez; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Strike is GRANTED. Operative complaint does not contain facts at this time to support claim for attorney's fees. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FISH TATE VS. ISMAEL RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 17, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT IRASEMA GUTIERREZ DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cause of action for declaratory relief is sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GANE SUGALI VS. OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 17, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT TONY GARNICKI, OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege fraud with requisite particularity including specific representations of fact, and to allege in good faith that the senior lien has been foreclosed upon. =(501/CFH)
